overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player moves from a covered plaza past holographic advertisements onto a neon-lit sidewalk lined with palm trees and towering digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with holographic floor advertisements

events.description: turning left to follow the building wall away from the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic plaza with glowing floor advertisements, approaching a large holographic noodle bowl sign

illuminated floor panel displaying animated advertisements
giant floating hologram of a ramen bowl with chopsticks
futuristic wooden public seating arranged in rows
large digital screen displaying animated characters with purple hair

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered plaza with wet reflective tiles and glowing floor advertisements. The camera moves forward toward a massive holographic noodle bowl sign floating above wooden benches, then turns left to follow the wall of a teal commercial building.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway between commercial buildings with sticker-covered walls

events.description: entering narrow walkway along building side, leaving open plaza behind
turning right at corner to face the main city street

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of a teal commercial building passing neon 'OPEN' signs and sticker-covered walls

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading 'OPEN' mounted on teal wall
wall covered with colorful stickers and graffiti decals
small structure with world map display and metal shutters

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrow enclosed walkway alongside the teal building, the camera passes a glowing 'OPEN' neon sign and walls covered in stickers. The space is tight and sheltered from the rain, with holographic floor ads still visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with holographic billboards and palm trees

events.description: exiting narrow walkway onto main city street with palm trees and traffic
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk lined with palm trees and towering holographic advertisements, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with black umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk
group of people with umbrellas standing near the street corner

entered.detail: dark glass facade with horizontal cyan neon strip running along the base
tall palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk
towering building covered in multiple layered digital advertisements and neon signs
futuristic illuminated bollard lighting the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the main city street, the scene opens to reveal a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The camera walks past a glass building with cyan neon trim while futuristic vehicles pass on the right, and towering holographic billboards illuminate the night sky ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit plaza into the expansive, rain-soaked streets of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by gliding across wet reflective tiles and glowing floor advertisements, passing a massive holographic noodle bowl before turning left to follow the wall of a teal commercial building. As the camera enters a narrow enclosed walkway, the environment tightens, passing a glowing neon open sign and sticker-covered walls while remaining sheltered from the rain. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera emerges onto the main city street, where the confined space gives way to a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and pedestrians with umbrellas. Finally, the view expands to reveal a glass building with cyan trim and towering holographic billboards that illuminate the night sky as futuristic vehicles stream past.
